text:
The following is a log from Slack with changes that have happened during my 10 day holiday. Please catch me up to speed. I don't care about otovo-bot. Also, please consider people working on the same thing, either inferred from terms used in the commits, or based on team: fredrikgyll, mathiaswo, annaiandresen, larsjr and kanishka-lamba are on the same team as me, so put extra emphasis on this. I don't want you to list out specific commits, just give me a high level overview of the developements and how things have changed through time.

```untitled

```

Here's a high-level overview of the key developments during your 10-day holiday:

1. Field Sales Improvements:
   - Significant updates to the field sales system, including:
     - New scheduling model and improvements to slot selection
     - Addition of appointment spacing
     - Ability to delete and reschedule appointments
     - Exclusion of public holidays when considering slots
     - New service area list view and creation form with map integration
     - Performance optimizations (caching, lazy loading)

2. Shopping Cart and Markup Changes:
   - Updates to markup views and forms
   - Addition of edit button to market list
   - Changes to base markup creation and zoned markup formsets

3. Battery-related Updates:
   - Allowing battery leasing in France (staging and production)
   - Addition of default battery package
   - Removal of standalone battery check when applying discounts

4. Translations and Internationalization:
   - Multiple updates to translations from Phrase
   - Improvements to translation contexts and message handling

5. Feature Toggles and A/B Testing:
   - Removal of unused feature flags
   - Implementation of new A/B test for sticky price bar on calc page
   - Integration of PostHog for A/B testing landing pages

6. UI/UX Improvements:
   - Updates to various components (e.g., ProductSwitch, NavBar)
   - New sticky content on calc page (A/B test)

7. Location and Mapping:
   - Improvements to NamedZone model and admin interface
   - Addition of GeoJSON import functionality

8. Performance and Infrastructure:
   - Various dependency updates
   - Improvements to CI/CD pipeline
   - Addition of schema caching for test suite

9. Bug Fixes and Minor Improvements:
   - Various small fixes across different areas of the application

These changes indicate a focus on improving the field sales process, enhancing the shopping cart experience, and continuing to refine various aspects of the system. There's also an emphasis on performance optimization and infrastructure improvements.

If you need any more details on specific aspects of these changes or have any questions about their potential impact, feel free to ask.
summary: Field Sales Overhaul and System wide Enhancements
